allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Select-Object Caption,Version; Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select-Object Name,NumberOfCores,NumberOfLogicalProcessors")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Format-List Caption,Version,BuildNumber,OSArchitecture; Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Format-List Name,NumberOfCores,NumberOfLogicalProcessors,MaxClockSpeed")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemory | ForEach-Object { [math]::Round\($_.Capacity/1GB,2\) } | Measure-Object -Sum | ForEach-Object { '\\''Total RAM: '\\'' + [math]::Round\($_.Sum,2\) + '\\'' GB'\\'' }')
